provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the full login path: command/login validates then delegates; zalo/login_profile maps creds + returns AccountProfile; lib.rs registers the command. Live smoke proved a real login.

findings.evidence: login_profile returns only AccountProfile (account_id + optional display_name); credentials are consumed in the zalo layer and never returned or logged. The live smoke prints only uid length + has_display_name.
findings.fix: Preserve this no-secret-egress property when session-manager holds the API handle and when secure-cred-store persists credentials.

summary: single-login is proven end-to-end: a real account logged in (uid_len=19, display name present) via the live smoke, and the offline suite guards the empty-credential path. command/login validates at the boundary and returns only the non-secret AccountProfile; zalo/login_profile is the sole zca-rust caller. No secrets cross IPC or appear in evidence. Safe to mark done.
